The [[Ulig Abaha Ltd.]] '''Dimel assault ship''' was a class of [[Warship/Legends|warship]] that was utilized by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. One of these vessels, the ''[[Eye of Shiblizar]]'', was utilized by slavers [[Magg]] and [[Zlarb/Legends|Zlarb]] for their operations.

==Behind the scenes==
The only statistics available for the vessel come from a specific and possibly modified example. The stats on this page are thus ambiguous on finer details and performance.

{{Ship-stub}}
